description: Remove the `boards.client_id` assumption from MSP-side visibility group board loading in the contact portal tab flow.
Remove the `boards.client_id` assumption from client portal admin visibility group board loading.
Validate submitted visibility-group board IDs by tenant existence and active status rather than client ownership.
Reject submitted visibility-group board IDs that are missing, cross-tenant, or inactive.
Keep visibility groups client-scoped through `client_portal_visibility_groups.client_id` for MSP and client-admin CRUD flows.
Keep contact assignment validation client-scoped through `group.client_id` and `contact.client_id`.
Correct the shared portal visibility resolver so it derives visible board IDs from group membership without requiring `boards.client_id`.
Preserve the resolver guard that rejects assigned groups whose `client_id` does not match the contact's `client_id`.
Continue enforcing ticket list visibility by combining `ticket.client_id = contact.client_id` with assigned-board filtering when a group exists.
Continue enforcing ticket detail and ticket-adjacent access by combining client scoping with assigned-board filtering.
Continue enforcing ticket creation board choices and submission validation using allowed board IDs rather than board client ownership.
Continue enforcing dashboard ticket-backed counts and summaries using the corrected visible board ID set.
Exclude inactive boards from MSP and client-admin board pickers while preserving stored group membership rows.
Exclude inactive boards from new ticket creation choices for restricted users while preserving historical group membership data.
Preserve backward compatibility for unassigned contacts, empty groups, pre-invite assignments, and assigned-group deletion guards.
Update plan/docs references so future work on this feature explicitly treats boards as tenant-scoped and visibility groups as client-scoped.
